text:
なんていうか、オレとおたくじゃ
格が違うよな？
悔しいけど認めるよ。

こんだけすごいモノ見せてもらって
手ぶらで帰すわけにもいかないし
オレからも礼をさせてくれ！

つまんねえアイテムだけど
受け取ってくれ！　ありが

Look, pal, you and I, we're just not on the
same level, are we? It's fine, I'm a big enough
man to admit it.

I can't just letcha go home empty-handed after
puttin' on a show like that. Here's a little
somethin' from me!

Yeah, yeah, I know it's just a dinky little
whatsit, but look, just take it! And thanks!
